response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song 'Joyfull' (じょいふる). The video includes significant character dialogue and an introduction sequence prior to the song performance, which have been transcribed and translated. I have discarded the unused parts of the reference lyrics and focused strictly on the vocalized content in the video. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the audio vocalizations, ensuring a tight fit for each phrase.

subtitles.original: 魔法少女ホロウィッチ！THE STAGE TRICK or MAGIC!
subtitles.english: Magical Girl HoloWitch! THE STAGE TRICK or MAGIC!

subtitles.original: トリック・オア・トリート！
みんな、盛り上がってるー？
ホロウィッチのオープニングアクト、どうだったー？
subtitles.english: How was the HoloWitch opening act?

subtitles.original: ここからもっともっと盛り上げていくから、
subtitles.english: We're going to keep firing things up even more from here,

subtitles.original: みんなで一緒に楽しもうねー！
subtitles.english: so let's all have fun together!

subtitles.original: 今日は我々ホロキャスの配信者だけじゃなく、
subtitles.english: Today, it's not just us HoloCast streamers,

subtitles.original: あの超人気歌手、カノンさんがゲストで来てくださってまーす！
subtitles.english: the super popular singer, Kanon-san, is here as a special guest!

subtitles.original: カノンさん、どうぞー！
トリック・オア・トリート。
みんな、今日は最後まで
よろしく。
いやまさかね、あのカノンさんと同じステージに立てるとは。
subtitles.english: I can't believe it. Getting to stand on the same stage as Kanon-san.

subtitles.original: いや本当、憧れですよ。
subtitles.english: Yeah, really, she's an idol to us.

subtitles.original: カノンさんの歌を聴くと、すっごくパワーもらえるのら！
subtitles.english: When I hear Kanon-san's songs, I get so much energy!

subtitles.original: そうそう、こんなにいただいちゃっていいんですかーってくらいね。
subtitles.english: Yeah, exactly. To the point where I feel like I'm receiving too much.

subtitles.original: うーん、めっちゃ元気出ますよねー。
subtitles.english: Mm, it really lifts your spirits, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: ありがとう。なんでもないから。
次の曲は、みんなも一緒に歌ってほしいのらー！
subtitles.english: For the next song, I want everyone to sing along!

subtitles.original: 君たち、遠慮しないで声出してね、声！
subtitles.english: You guys, don't hold back and let me hear your voices!

subtitles.original: 君の声を聴かせて
さあ冒険してみない？
subtitles.english: Come on, won't you go on an adventure?
